markets.question: Will Israel launch a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Israel initiates a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A "major ground offensive" is defined as a large-scale military operation that involves more than 1,000 Israeli ground forces entering Lebanese territory that was not under Israeli control at the start of the offensive. This excludes smaller raids, special operations, or limited incursions directly bordering buffer zones already un
markets.eventTitle: Will Israel launch a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31?
markets.headline: ISRAEL LAUNCHES MAJOR GROUND OFFENSIVE IN LEBANON — MARKET SURGES TO 99%

markets.question: Italy Judicial Reform Referendum passes?
markets.description:
This market refers to a constitutional referendum expected to be held in Italy in the second half of March 2026 concerning proposed amendments to the Constitution of Italy related to the organization and functioning of the judiciary.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Italian judicial reform constitutional referendum (Nordio Reform Referendum), or a substantively equivalent referendum on the same constitutional amendments, is approved by a majority of valid votes cast in the nationwide re
markets.headline: ITALY JUDICIAL REFORM REFERENDUM CRASHES TO DEFEAT

markets.question: US x Iran ceasefire by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if there is an official ceasefire agreement, defined as a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in direct military engagement, between the United States and Iran by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, an “official ceasefire agreement” requires clear public confirmation from both the United States government and the government of Iran that they have agreed to halt military hostilities against one another.

If the agreement is off
markets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire hopes build as momentum shifts toward deal...

markets.question: Will the U.S. invade Iran by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United States commences a military offensive intended to establish control over any portion of Iran by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, land de facto controlled by Iran or the United States as of November 4, 2025 12:00 PM ET, will be considered the sovereign territory of that country.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible sources.
markets.eventTitle: Will the U.S. invade Iran by March 31?
markets.headline: US invasion of Iran still on the table as March deadline looms...

markets.question: Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Kharg Island is no longer under Iranian control by April 30, 2026 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

“No longer under the control of Iran” means that Iran no longer exercises primary governmental or military control over Kharg Island, and another state, occupying force, or internationally backed authority has established control over the island.

Temporary raids, isolated landings, special operations, bombardment, sabotage, naval presen
markets.eventTitle: Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by...?
markets.headline: Kharg Island control question fades as Iranian grip holds

markets.question: Will the Iranian regime fall by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Islamic Republic of Iran’s current ruling regime is overthrown, collapsed, or otherwise ceases to govern by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This requires a broad consensus of reporting indicating that core structures of the Islamic Republic (e.g. the office of the Supreme Leader, the Guardian Council, IRGC control under clerical authority) have been dissolved, incapacitated, or replaced by a fundamentally differen
markets.eventTitle: Will the Iranian regime fall by June 30?
markets.headline: Confidence crumbles in Iranian regime collapse by summer

markets.question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if IMF Portwatch publishes a 7-day moving average of transit calls (“Arrivals of Ships”) for the Strait of Hormuz equal to or above 60 for any date between market creation and April 30, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Daily transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as IMF Portwatch publishes a 7-day
markets.eventTitle: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
markets.headline: Strait of Hormuz traffic still choked — normalization a coin flip

markets.question: Will Silver (SI) settle over $95 on the final trading day of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official CME settlement price for the Active Month of Silver futures on the final trading day of June 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Silver (SI) futures contracts, the Active Month is the nearest of CME's designated delivery-cycle months (March, May, July, September, December) that is not the spot month. The Active Month becomes a non-active month effective on its First Position Date, at which po
markets.headline: SILVER EXPECTATIONS GUTTED — JUNE FORECASTS PLUNGE ACROSS THE BOARD

markets.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $90 by end of March?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, on any trading day, the official CME settlement price for the Active Month (front month) of Crude Oil (CL) futures is equal to or below the listed price between market creation and the final trading day of March 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Crude Oil (CL) futures contracts, the active month is the nearest of the contract months listed. The active month becomes a non-active month effective two business days prior to the spot mont
markets.eventTitle: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit__ by end of March?

markets.question: Fed rate cut by June 2026 meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is decreased at any point between December 16, 2025 and the completion of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting for June 2026, currently scheduled for June 16-17. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

If no June meeting takes place by July 7, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, and no qualifying rate cut has been announced, this market will resolve to "No". 

Emergency rate cuts will qualify.

markets.headline: Fed rate cut by June now a long shot as expectations collapse

markets.question: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal funds range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Federal Reserve's June 2026 meeting.

If the target federal funds rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed optio

markets.question: Will SpaceX IPO by June 30, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if SpaceX (Space Exploration Technologies Corp.) completes an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by the listed date ET, as confirmed by official company announcements and credible news sources. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The IPO refers to the first sale of stock by the listed company to the public on any recognized stock exchange.

If SpaceX is acquired by another company that is already public, this market will immediately resolve to "No."

markets.question: Will the U.S. tariff rate on China be between 15% and 25% on March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the general tariff rate on imports into the United States from the People's Republic of China on March 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

The general tariff rate refers to the base tariff rate paid on imports, including any general tariff the U.S. imposes on all imports (e.g. a 10% tariff on all U.S. imports and a 10% tariff on top of that on Chinese imports would equal a 20% tariff).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will reso

markets.headline: China tariff rate expected to settle between 5% and 15% on March 31

Upon publication, the specified release will be made available at: https://www.bea.gov/news/current-releases

The relevant figure may be found in the annual summary under “Exports, Impor

markets.question: Will Robert Golob be the next Prime Minister of Slovenia?

Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Slovenia on March 22, 2026.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

markets.question: Will there be at least 4000 measles cases in the U.S. in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there have been the specified amount or more confirmed cases of Measles (Rubeola) in humans in the territory of the United States of America in 2026 according to the CDC case counter between January 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. markets.question: Supreme Court vacancy in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if at least one seat on the United States Supreme Court becomes vacant between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official announcements from the U.S. Government. However, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
markets.headline: Supreme Court vacancy this year? Expectations tick higher...

markets.question: Will Marco Rubio win the 2028 Republican presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Republican Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Republican Party sources.

Any replacement of the Republican nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
markets.headline: RFK Jr. surges to near-frontrunner for 2028 GOP nomination

markets.question: US recession by end of 2026?

markets.headline: US recession by end of 2026 sits at one-in-three...

The 2026 Gyeonggi Province gubernatorial election is scheduled to take place on June 3, 2026 to elect the next Governor of Gyeonggi Province.

If the result of this election isn't known by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolv

markets.question: Will Hong Wang win the 2026 Fields Medal?
markets.description:
The Fields Medal is a prize regarded as the top award in the field of mathematics worldwide. It is awarded to two, three, or four mathematicians under 40 years of age at the International Congress of the International Mathematical Union (IMU), a meeting that takes place every four years. The International Congress of Mathematicians 2026 (ICM 2026) is scheduled to take place from July 23 to July 30, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the winners of the 2026 Fields medal.

markets.eventTitle: Who will win the 2026 Fields Medal?
markets.headline: Hong Wang emerges as overwhelming Fields Medal favorite

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the popular vote in the 2026 U.S. House of Representatives midterm elections by between 2% and 4%?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the popular vote margin of victory between the Democratic Party and the Republican Party in the US House of Representatives midterm elections, scheduled for November 3, 2026.

For the purpose of this market, the “popular vote margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentage of valid votes cast for all Democratic Party House candidates and the percentage of valid votes cast for all Republican Party House candidates in this elect

markets.headline: Democrats' House popular vote margin narrows in latest shift
